  Filename: [33m/package/lib/show-hide-password.component.d.ts[0m
   Pattern: [32m(npm owner|password|htpasswd|auth_?token|secret_?key|private_?key|authorized_keys?|npmrc|\.ssh|usersecrets?|api_?keys|nuget\.config|\.identityservice)[0m
[30;1m14 | [0m[35m * Add a split input button to password or text input. Toggles input type between "text" and "passwo[0m
[30;1m15 | [0m[35m *[0m
[30;1m16 | [0m[35m * @example[0m
[30;1m17 | [0m[35m * <show-hide-password size="sm|lg">[0m
[30;1m18 | [0m[35m * <input type="password" name=... />[0m
[30;1m19 | [0m[35m * </show-hide-password>[0m
[30;1m20 | [0m[35m */[0m

[31m--[ [0m[34mMatch #[0m[33m78[0m[34m of [0m[33m138[0m[31m ]--[0m
   Rule Id: [34mBD000701[0m
       Tag: [34mSecurity.Backdoor.DataExfiltration.Token[0m
  Severity: [36mImportant[0m, Confidence: [36mHigh[0m
  Filename: [33m/package/lib/show-hide-password.component.d.ts[0m
   Pattern: [32m(npm owner|password|htpasswd|auth_?token|secret_?key|private_?key|authorized_keys?|npmrc|\.ssh|usersecrets?|api_?keys|nuget\.config|\.identityservice)[0m
[30;1m11 | [0m[35m    Light = "light"[0m
[30;1m12 | [0m[35m}[0m

[31m--[ [0m[34mMatch #[0m[33m96[0m[34m of [0m[33m138[0m[31m ]--[0m
   Rule Id: [34mBD000701[0m
       Tag: [34mSecurity.Backdoor.DataExfiltration.Token[0m
  Severity: [36mImportant[0m, Confidence: [36mHigh[0m
  Filename: [33m/package/README.md[0m
   Pattern: [32m(npm owner|password|htpasswd|auth_?token|secret_?key|private_?key|authorized_keys?|npmrc|\.ssh|usersecrets?|api_?keys|nuget\.config|\.identityservice)[0m
[30;1m72 | [0m[35m### as module (angular pre v16 and ngx-show-hide-password pre v2.7.0):[0m
[30;1m73 | [0m[35m```ts[0m
[30;1m74 | [0m[35m// app.module.ts[0m
[30;1m75 | [0m[35mimport { ShowHidePasswordModule } from 'ngx-show-hide-password';[0m
[30;1m76 | [0m[35m// no need to import @fortawesome/angular-fontawesome for the component[0m
[30;1m77 | [0m[35m...[0m
[30;1m78 | [0m[35m@NgModule({[0m

[31m--[ [0m[34mMatch #[0m[33m97[0m[34m of [0m[33m138[0m[31m ]--[0m
   Rule Id: [34mBD000701[0m
       Tag: [34mSecurity.Backdoor.DataExfiltration.Token[0m
  Severity: [36mImportant[0m, Confidence: [36mHigh[0m
  Filename: [33m/package/README.md[0m
   Pattern: [32m(npm owner|password|htpasswd|auth_?token|secret_?key|private_?key|authorized_keys?|npmrc|\.ssh|usersecrets?|api_?keys|nuget\.config|\.identityservice)[0m
[30;1m72 | [0m[35m### as module (angular pre v16 and ngx-show-hide-password pre v2.7.0):[0m
[30;1m73 | [0m[35m```ts[0m
[30;1m74 | [0m[35m// app.module.ts[0m
[30;1m75 | [0m[35mimport { ShowHidePasswordModule } from 'ngx-show-hide-password';[0m
[30;1m76 | [0m[35m// no need to import @fortawesome/angular-fontawesome for the component[0m
[30;1m77 | [0m[35m...[0m
[30;1m78 | [0m[35m@NgModule({[0m

[31m--[ [0m[34mMatch #[0m[33m98[0m[34m of [0m[33m138[0m[31m ]--[0m
   Rule Id: [34mBD000701[0m
       Tag: [34mSecurity.Backdoor.DataExfiltration.Token[0m
  Severity: [36mImportant[0m, Confidence: [36mHigh[0m
  Filename: [33m/package/README.md[0m
   Pattern: [32m(npm owner|password|htpasswd|auth_?token|secret_?key|private_?key|authorized_keys?|npmrc|\.ssh|usersecrets?|api_?keys|nuget\.config|\.identityservice)[0m
[30;1m69 | [0m[35m}[0m
[30;1m70 | [0m[35m```[0m
[30;1m71 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m72 | [0m[35m### as module (angular pre v16 and ngx-show-hide-password pre v2.7.0):[0m
[30;1m73 | [0m[35m```ts[0m
[30;1m74 | [0m[35m// app.module.ts[0m
[30;1m75 | [0m[35mimport { ShowHidePasswordModule } from 'ngx-show-hide-password';[0m

[31m--[ [0m[34mMatch #[0m[33m99[0m[34m of [0m[33m138[0m[31m ]--[0m
   Rule Id: [34mBD000701[0m
       Tag: [34mSecurity.Backdoor.DataExfiltration.Token[0m
  Severity: [36mImportant[0m, Confidence: [36mHigh[0m
  Filename: [33m/package/README.md[0m
   Pattern: [32m(npm owner|password|htpasswd|auth_?token|secret_?key|private_?key|authorized_keys?|npmrc|\.ssh|usersecrets?|api_?keys|nuget\.config|\.identityservice)[0m
[30;1m62 | [0m[35m  constructor(private showHideService: ShowHideService) {[0m
[30;1m63 | [0m[35m    ...[0m
[30;1m64 | [0m[35m    effect(() => {[0m
[30;1m65 | [0m[35m      const show = this.showHideService.getSignal('password')();[0m
[30;1m66 | [0m[35m      ...[0m
[30;1m67 | [0m[35m    });[0m
[30;1m68 | [0m[35m  }[0m

[30;1m52 | [0m[35m  ...[0m
[30;1m53 | [0m[35m  standalone: true,[0m
[30;1m54 | [0m[35m  imports: [[0m

[30;1m27 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m28 | [0m[35m:white_check_mark: e.g. for angular version 8:[0m
[30;1m29 | [0m[35m```sh[0m
[30;1m30 | [0m[35mnpm install ngx-show-hide-password@~2.1.0 --save[0m

[30;1m33 | [0m[35m    @fortawesome/free-solid-svg-icons --save[0m

   Pattern: [32m(npm owner|password|htpasswd|auth_?token|secret_?key|private_?key|authorized_keys?|npmrc|\.ssh|usersecrets?|api_?keys|nuget\.config|\.identityservice)[0m

[31m--[ [0m[34mMatch #[0m[33m119[0m[34m of [0m[33m138[0m[31m ]--[0m
   Rule Id: [34mBD000610[0m
       Tag: [34mSecurity.Backdoor.LOLBAS.Linux[0m
  Severity: [36mModerate[0m, Confidence: [36mLow[0m
  Filename: [33m/package/fesm2022/ngx-show-hide-password.mjs.map[0m
   Pattern: [32m\s(apt|apt\-get|aria2c|arp|ash|awk|base64|bash|bpftrace|busybox|cat|chmod|chown|cp|cpan|cpulimit|crontab|csh|curl|cut|dash|dd|diff|dmesg|dmsetup|dnf|docker|dpkg|easy_install|ed|emacs|env|expand|expect|facter|find|finger|flock|fmt|ftp|gawk|gdb|gimp|git|grep|head|iftop|ionice|ip|irb|jjs|journalctl|jrunscript|ksh|ld\.so|ldconfig|logsave|ltrace|lua|mail|mawk|mount|mtr|mv|mysql|nano|nawk|nc|nice|nl|nmap|node|od|openssl|perl|pg|php|pic|pico|pip|puppet|readelf|red|rlogin|rlwrap|rpm|rpmquery|rsync|ruby|run\-mailcap|run\-parts|rvim|scp|screen|script|sed|service|setarch|sftp|shuf|smbclient|socat|sort|sqlite3|ssh|start\-stop\-daemon|stdbuf|strace|systemctl|tail|tar|taskset|tclsh|tcpdump|tee|telnet|tftp|time|timeout|tmux|top|ul|unexpand|uniq|unshare|vi|vim|watch|wget|whois|wish|xargs|xxd|yum|zsh|zypper)\s[0m

[30;1m253 | [0m[35m```shell[0m
[30;1m254 | [0m[35mgit branch -m master main[0m
[30;1m255 | [0m[35mgit fetch origin[0m
[30;1m256 | [0m[35mgit branch -u origin/main main[0m
[30;1m257 | [0m[35m```[0m
